name: QPack Assistant
description: AI docs chat that runs entirely in your browser — TurboQuant retrieval + a local LLM, no backend.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://*.huggingface.co https://*.hf.co https://*.xethub.hf.co https://huggingface.co https://raw.githubusercontent.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net data: blob:; img-src 'self' data:; worker-src 'self'
